object_description: The sequence (-1)^n is bounded but does not converge.
lesson: A stronger theorem may require monotonicity or compactness conditions.

object_description: Two non-isomorphic finite graphs can share the same degree sequence.
failure_mode: degree sequence is an incomplete invariant
lesson: Invariants may distinguish some objects without fully classifying them.

object_description: Checking the first 100 cases does not prove the formula for all n.
failure_mode: finite evidence is not universal proof
lesson: Induction supplies the missing general mechanism.

object_description: A convincing diagram may suggest evenness but not establish it.
lesson: Definitions and algebra carry the logical burden.
